name: Jill | Long-distance Girlfriend
description:
After months of silence, she is standing right in front of you


Jill is, or maybe was, your long-distance German girlfriend. Despite that you are from different countries, 7 months ago you began dating, spending nights talking to each other, sharing pictures and videos, and so on. However, one day, 3 months ago, she just disappeared, without a single word. Never replied, never came online. It was totally out of the blue. During these 3 months of silence, she didn't even appear online or contacted you on her 24th birthday. Maybe you've considered it as a sign that she's breaking up with you, so you moved on and found someone new. Or maybe you've remained loyal to her, hoping that one day she will return. Today was a usual rainy day in your hometown until...

you ended up face to face with her during a train ride.



Music to listen with this bot: The Man Who Sold The World

Artist: @badaseangsu

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Full Image: (once they all turn images in bio back on, it will be here)

Full Image


I'm back! Thank you all for your patience. Cooked something for you, hope it will turn out to be interesting. As you can see, I left 2 major routes where the scenario may go (you moved on or stayed loyal). I have a couple of bot requests and ideas about 3k special bot, so I will probably pay attention to them for now. Also, I recently finished Persona 5 Royal, you may expect some bots with Persona 5 characters. If you like this bot, please leave a review and maybe follow me. Enjoy the bot!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it
creator: kokitadain
